transcript.final_response:
Done.

Created `/etc/env.conf` with:

```bash
APP_ENV=production
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_SECRET=s3cret123
```

Sourced and exported all three variables, created `/scripts/check_env.sh`, and verified:

```text
APP_ENV=production
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_SECRET=s3cret123
```

Also confirmed via:

```bash
env | grep APP_
```

Output:

```text
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_ENV=production
APP_SECRET=s3cret123
```

Environment variables propagated correctly.
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /etc /scripts
cat > /etc/env.conf <<'EOF'
APP_ENV=production
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_SECRET=s3cret123
EOF

source /etc/env.conf
export APP_ENV APP_DEBUG APP_SECRET

cat > /scripts/check_env.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
printf 'APP_ENV=%s\n' "${APP_ENV:-}"
printf 'APP_DEBUG=%s\n' "${APP_DEBUG:-}"
printf 'APP_SECRET=%s\n' "${APP_SECRET:-}"
EOF
chmod +x /scripts/check_env.sh

echo 'Running /scripts/check_env.sh:'
bash /scripts/check_env.sh

echo
echo "Running env | grep APP_:"
env | grep APP_ | sort

echo
echo 'Verification:'
[[ "$APP_ENV" == "production" ]]
[[ "$APP_DEBUG" == "false" ]]
[[ "$APP_SECRET" == "s3cret123" ]]
[[ "$(bash /scripts/check_env.sh)" == $'APP_ENV=production
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_SECRET=s3cret123' ]]
echo 'Environment variables propagated correctly.'
